extensionDescription.message: Atunse ọjọgbọn ti iwe kikọ Larubawa fun gbogbo oju opo wẹẹbu. N ṣatunṣe aye laarin awọn lẹta, n fi awọn fonti Larubawa ti o lẹwa sii, ati ṣatunṣe awọn ọran fifunni ti o fa ki ọrọ Larubawa tuka.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Mu ṣiṣẹ tabi mu itẹsiwaju Arabic Type ṣiṣẹ

letterSpacingNote.message: Aye laarin awọn lẹta ni a ṣeto si 0 nigbagbogbo lati ṣe idiwọ iyapa awọn lẹta Larubawa. Eyi ni idi ti o wọpọ julọ ti fifunni Larubawa ti o bajẹ lori oju opo wẹẹbu.

forceRTLDescription.message: N fi agbara mu itọsọna ọtun-si-osi lori awọn bulọọki ọrọ Larubawa. Mu ṣiṣẹ fun awọn oju opo wẹẹbu nibiti Larubawa ti han ni aṣiṣe lati osi-si-ọtun.

diacriticsDescription.message: Mu fifunni awọn ami faweli Larubawa (tashkeel) dara si lati ṣe idiwọ gige loke ati isalẹ laini ọrọ.

disableSiteLabel.message: Mu ṣiṣẹ lori oju opo wẹẹbu yii

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Lo fonti ti o yatọ lori oju opo wẹẹbu yii

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Yan fonti ti o yatọ fun oju opo wẹẹbu yii nikan, ti o bori yiyan fonti agbaye rẹ.

siteFontPickerLabel.message: Fonti fun oju opo wẹẹbu yii

exceptionsLabel.message: Awọn Oju opo Wẹẹbu Ti a Pa

exceptionsEmpty.message: Ko si awọn oju opo wẹẹbu ti a pa.

fontSourceNote.message: Awọn fonti jẹ iṣẹ nipasẹ Google Fonts. Nbeere asopọ intanẹẹti fun ikojọpọ akọkọ.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Awọn ibeere fonti ni a firanṣẹ si awọn olupin Google. Wo fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Ọrọ Larubawa ti ri — awọn eroja $COUNT$ ti ṣatunṣe.

statusGlobalMode.message: Lilo ipo agbaye — awọn abuda lang/dir ti ri.

statusNoArabic.message: Ko si ọrọ Larubawa ti a rii lori oju-iwe yii.

statusSiteDisabled.message: Pa a lori oju opo wẹẹbu yii.

statusContentScriptUnavailable.message: Ko le wọle si oju-iwe yii.

siteBannerText.message: Arabic Type ti wa ni pipa lori $HOSTNAME$.

removeExceptionAriaLabel.message: Yọ $HOSTNAME$ kuro ninu awọn oju opo wẹẹbu ti a pa
